shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch standing in front of a vintage-looking browser showing plain HTML links, representing Craigslist's unchanged interface.
assets.caption: Hatch standing in front of a vintage-looking browser showing plain HTML links, representing Craigslist's unchanged interface.
assets.prompt: Craigslist Minimalism | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with the graduation cap and growth arrow) standing in front of a giant browser window showing plain blue hyperlinks on a white background, circa-1996 web aesthetic. Hatch's expression is curious and slightly amused, cap tilted. Cream background behind the browser. No speech bubble. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing toward a side-by-side comparison of a polished app and a plain HTML page, highlighting the unchanged interface.
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing toward a side-by-side comparison of a polished app and a plain HTML page, highlighting the unchanged interface.
assets.prompt: Craigslist Minimalism | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, gesturing toward a split scene: on the left, a polished 2015 mobile app interface with image galleries and ratings; on the right, a plain HTML page with blue links from 1996 that looks identical to 2020. Hatch's gesture highlights the right side. Cream background. No speech. Watermark: "HackProduct" bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.

assets.alt: Hatch examining a diagram showing users repeatedly returning to the same URL structure across two decades, representing workflow lock-in.
assets.caption: Hatch examining a diagram showing users repeatedly returning to the same URL structure across two decades, representing workflow lock-in.
assets.prompt: Craigslist Minimalism | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose, looking at a diagram showing users with arrows pointing to the same URL structure over and over across years labeled 2000, 2005, 2010, 2015, 2020. The arrows represent repeated workflows. A small lock icon near the URL structure. Cream background. Watermark: "HackProduct" bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.

assets.alt: Hatch pointing at a chart showing newspaper classified revenue declining while Craigslist traffic holds steady over a decade.
assets.caption: Hatch pointing at a chart showing newspaper classified revenue declining while Craigslist traffic holds steady over a decade.
assets.prompt: Craigslist Minimalism | evidence-card: Hatch pointing at a simple bar chart showing US newspaper classified ad revenue collapsing from 2000 to 2012 while a second bar (Craigslist visitors) holds steady. Minimal chart style, cream background. Hatch's expression is attentive, not triumphant. Watermark: "HackProduct" bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1000. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.alt: Hatch standing beside a signpost with Redesign and Stability arrows, looking at the viewer in a coaching posture.

assets.prompt: Craigslist Minimalism | lesson-frame: Hatch in calm coaching pose, standing beside a large signpost with two arrows: one pointing to "Redesign" and one pointing to "Stability." Hatch is not pointing to either — it is looking at the viewer, as if inviting reflection. Cream background, no copy. Watermark: "HackProduct" bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker.
